actions.title: Commission Mandatory Energy Audit (EnEfG §8)

alerts.description: Daily consumption repeatedly exceeds the rolling baseline by 30-60%.
alerts.recommended_action: Inspect scheduling/After-hours loads; check for a stuck damper or simultaneous heat+cool.

alerts.description: Daily consumption repeatedly exceeds the rolling baseline by 30-60%.
alerts.recommended_action: Inspect scheduling/After-hours loads; check for a stuck damper or simultaneous heat+cool.

alerts.description: HVAC energy per degree-day is running above the building-type benchmark.
alerts.recommended_action: Review setpoints, economiser operation and AHU scheduling.

alerts.description: Heating COP has drifted below the expected band on heating days.
alerts.recommended_action: Check heat-pump refrigerant charge, defrost cycles and source-side flow.

alerts.description: Carbon intensity per m2 exceeds the reference for this building type.
alerts.recommended_action: Shift flexible load off carbon-peak hours; review heating fuel mix.

alerts.description: A large share of consumption occurs outside occupied hours.
alerts.recommended_action: Tighten BMS schedules; audit always-on plug and process loads.

abatement.note: Indicative marginal abatement cost: (net CapEx ÷ measure lifetime − annual saving) ÷ annual tCO₂, undiscounted. Negative = the measure pays for itself. Decision-support, not audited finance.
